title: myosotis virginica var. macrosperma
intro: Myosotis virginica var. macrosperma, also known as the tall-flowered forget-me-not, is a variety of the forget-me-not plant native to North America, characterized by its larger seed size compared to other varieties. The medicinal properties of Myosotis virginica var. macrosperma include its potential anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can be attributed to its alkaloid and glycoside content. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to ease menstrual cramps and other female reproductive issues. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Myosotis virginica var. macrosperma are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
